nasb.text: Then they captured the king and brought him to the king of Babylon at Riblah, and he passed sentence on him.

esv.text: Then they captured the king and brought him up to the king of Babylon at Riblah, and they passed sentence on him.

cnv.text: 他們把王擒住，把他解到利比拉巴比倫王那裡；他們就宣判他的罪。

ccb.text: 迦勒底人擒住西底迦，把他押到利比拉见巴比伦王，在那里审判他。
